subject: Fix query across all anchors does not filter on Dataspace
commit_message:
Fix query across all anchors does not filter on Dataspace

    CPS-1582: NullPointerException in queryDataNodesAcrossAnchors
    CPS-1580: Query Across All Anchors Does NOT Filter on Dataspace

Issue-ID: CPS-1580
Change-ID: I73f97f986a817d423f93a8d922dcd9647b3003cd
Signed-off-by: rajesh.kumar <rk00747546@techmahindra.com>

Patch Set 12:

To fix the coverage issue, you may lower the coverage threshold in cps-ri/pom.xml
    <properties>
        <minimum-coverage>0.80</minimum-coverage>
    </properties>

This is okay, since new tests are in integration-test module, and sonar measures overall coverage at 97%.
